title: ligularia bigelovii
intro: Ligularia bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's ligularia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Pacific coastal regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ligularia bigelovii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even help in managing symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Ligularia bigelovii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
